lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Blueprint definitions (blueprints.json) and experimental effects (specials.json); the per-roll material data — the authoritative Per Roll figures.

sources.label: EDEngineer
sources.what: Experimental-effect data and material-cost cross-checks; the indicative Avg Rolls / Total estimates.

sources.label: Inara — Blueprints
sources.what: Per-blueprint pages: grades, modifiers, materials per grade, and which engineers offer each.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Fandom Wiki
sources.what: Technical Blueprints reference — blueprint mechanics, grades, and experimental-effect descriptions.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: End-to-end engineering tutorial: blueprints, grades G1-G5, the materials each needs, and applying upgrades at engineers.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Walkthrough of which blueprints to pin at each engineer for remote-workbench use.
